scripts.dev: npm run prepare:server && concurrently -k -n server,web "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:server: cd apps/server && uv run python -m app.dev
scripts.preview: npm run prepare:server && concurrently -k -n server,web "npm run preview:server" "npm run preview:web"
scripts.preview:server: cd apps/server && uv run python -m app.serve
scripts.test: npm --workspace apps/web run test && cd apps/server && uv run pytest
scripts.type-check: npm --workspace apps/web run type-check && cd apps/server && uv run python -m compileall app tests
